summary: Phase A-D Testing Complete: 14/14 backend tests passed (100%), all frontend features verified via Playwright. Landing page overhaul (hero, testimonials, opportunity detection), Radar Alert System endpoints, Onboarding wizard, and Elite features all working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/notifications/radar-scan requires auth (401 without token)
Backend: POST /api/notifications/radar-scan works with admin auth
Backend: GET /api/notifications/radar-detections returns products
Backend: POST /api/notifications/radar-digest sends email (or skips if no detections)
Backend: GET /api/user/onboarding-status returns status
Backend: POST /api/user/reset-onboarding resets status
Backend: POST /api/user/complete-onboarding accepts experience_level and preferred_niches
Backend: Onboarding status correctly shows completed after completing
Backend: GET /api/public/featured-product returns product for landing page
Backend: GET /api/products returns products with score fields
Backend: GET /api/stripe/plans returns 4 tiers (Free, Starter, Pro, Elite)
Backend: Plans have correct GBP prices (Free=0, Starter=19, Pro=39, Elite=79)
Backend: Admin user has elite plan access
Backend: Elite user has all premium features enabled
Frontend: Landing hero shows 'Find winning products early. Launch them faster.'
Frontend: Landing CTA says 'Start with Starter — £19/mo'
Frontend: 'AI Ecommerce Launch Assistant' badge visible
Frontend: Live demo card displays featured product
Frontend: Opportunity detection section with 'Live Radar Detections'
Frontend: 3 mock radar products (Portable Blender Pro, LED Sunset Lamp, Smart Posture Corrector)
Frontend: Testimonials section with 3 cards (Sarah K., James M., Priya D.)
Frontend: Landing pricing section shows Starter £19, Pro £39, Elite £79
Frontend: Pricing page comparison table has 4 columns (Free, Starter £19/mo, Pro £39/mo, Elite £79/mo)
Frontend: Onboarding modal has 4 interactive steps (experience, niches, opportunity, analyze)
Frontend: Onboarding step 1 shows 3 experience levels
Frontend: Onboarding step 2 shows 12 niche categories
Frontend: Onboarding step 3 fetches featured product from API
Frontend: Onboarding step 4 shows 'Analyze This Product' CTA
Frontend: Dashboard shows 'Launch' button for Elite users (found 5 buttons)
Frontend: InsightLockedNudge NOT shown for Elite user (correct behavior)
Frontend: Daily Opportunities panel visible
Frontend: TrendScout Radar section visible
seed_data_creation: None - used existing admin user and product data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase A-D features all verified working: Landing page has new hero headline, CTA, AI badge, testimonials (3 cards), opportunity detection section with mock radar data, and pricing section. Pricing page comparison table now has 4 columns with correct prices. Radar Alert endpoints (radar-scan, radar-detections, radar-digest) all working. Onboarding wizard is a 4-step interactive modal (experience → niches → product opportunity → analyze CTA) that saves preferences to user profile. Dashboard shows Launch buttons for Elite users on radar products. InsightLockedNudge correctly NOT shown for Elite users (it's for Starter only).

Landing Page Phase A.hero_headline: Find winning products early. Launch them faster.
Landing Page Phase A.opportunity_detection: Live Radar Detections with 3 mock products

Pricing Page.status: FIXED - now shows all 4 tiers with correct prices
